title: Active Shooter Preparedness
summary: Evaluates whether the facility has planned, coordinated, and maintained capabilities to prevent, respond to, and recover from active shooter incidents.

question_families.title: Emergency action plan integration
question_families.intent: Facility emergency action plans explicitly address active shooter scenarios, roles, and response actions.
question_prompts: Do facility emergency action plans and procedures explicitly address active shooter scenarios and response actions?
Are roles and responsibilities defined for facility staff actions during an active shooter incident?
Are evacuation routes and shelter-in-place locations documented for active shooter scenarios?

question_families.title: Training and awareness
question_families.intent: Facility staff receive initial and recurring training on active shooter response procedures and recognition of potential threats.
question_prompts: Do facility staff receive initial and recurring training on active shooter response procedures?
Is training provided on recognizing and reporting behaviors that may indicate a potential active shooter threat?
Are facility staff trained on evacuation procedures and shelter-in-place protocols for active shooter scenarios?

question_families.title: Law enforcement coordination
question_families.intent: Coordination with local law enforcement for active shooter response is established and maintained, including site access and floor plans.
question_prompts: Has the facility coordinated with local law enforcement to establish active shooter response protocols and site access procedures?
Are facility floor plans and access information provided to local law enforcement to support active shooter response operations?
Are law enforcement contact information and response procedures documented and accessible to facility staff?

question_families.title: Communication and mass notification
question_families.intent: Facility has established communication and mass notification capabilities to alert staff and visitors during an active shooter incident.
question_prompts: Does the facility have a mass notification system capable of alerting staff and visitors during an active shooter incident?
Are communication procedures established for notifying law enforcement and coordinating response during an active shooter incident?
Are backup communication methods available if primary systems are compromised during an active shooter incident?

question_families.title: Access control and hardening
question_families.intent: Facility access controls and physical security measures are designed to delay or prevent unauthorized access that could enable an active shooter incident.
question_prompts: Do facility access controls and entry points provide sufficient delay or prevention of unauthorized access that could enable an active shooter incident?
Are visitor management procedures established to verify and monitor visitors who could pose an active shooter threat?
Are facility entry points and critical areas hardened to delay or prevent unauthorized access during an active shooter incident?

question_families.title: Exercises and drills
question_families.intent: Facility conducts regular exercises and drills to test and validate active shooter response procedures and coordination.
question_prompts: Does the facility conduct regular exercises or drills to test active shooter response procedures?
Are active shooter exercises conducted in coordination with local law enforcement and first responders?
Are exercise results documented and used to update active shooter response procedures?

ofc_template_bank.text_template: Ensure facility emergency action plans and procedures explicitly address active shooter scenarios, including roles, responsibilities, evacuation routes, and shelter-in-place locations.
Establish and maintain an initial and recurring training program for facility staff on active shooter response procedures, threat recognition, and reporting procedures.
Coordinate with local law enforcement to establish active shooter response protocols, provide facility floor plans and access information, and document law enforcement contact procedures.
Implement and maintain a mass notification system capable of alerting staff and visitors during an active shooter incident, with backup communication methods available.
Implement access controls and physical security measures designed to delay or prevent unauthorized access that could enable an active shooter incident, including visitor management procedures.
Conduct regular exercises and drills to test active shooter response procedures in coordination with local law enforcement, and document results to update response procedures.
